info.title: Marz Test API
info.description:
Test-only contract for E2E fixtures. All endpoints require `X-Test-Secret`
and are gated by `TEST_API_ENABLED=true`. Never available in production.

Consumed by marz-front E2E suite via a separate Orval generation target so
the production client stays free of test-only types.

post.description:
Creates a test account or returns an existing one matched by clerk_user_id.

Email is UNIQUE. If the email already belongs to another `is_test=true`
account (zombie from a prior run that crashed before cleanup), the
zombie is hard-deleted and the slot is reused with the new
clerk_user_id. If the email belongs to a non-test account the request
is rejected with 500 (production data is never touched).

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: create_test_account_failed.

post.description:
Hard-deletes every is_test account whose email matches the SQL LIKE
pattern (and cascades to chat / identity dependents per the per-account
path). Always scoped to is_test=true, so production rows are never
touched.

The pattern must contain at least one SQL wildcard (`%` or `_`) to
prevent accidental scope blow-up. Returns the number of accounts
deleted. Use this as an escape hatch when zombies from prior runs
block fresh fixtures.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, invalid_email_like.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: purge_failed. Cause is included in `message` for /v1/test/* endpoints.

post.description: Forces a test account into a specific onboarding state.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, invalid_status, invalid_kind.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: set_onboarding_failed.

post.description:
Marks the account as fully onboarded for the requested kind AND seeds
the side effects production onboarding would create:

- kind=brand → creates an `identity_brand_workspaces` row + an owner
  `identity_brand_memberships` row.
- kind=creator → creates an `identity_creator_profiles` row with
  minimum valid content (niches=["general"], empty content_types and
  best_videos).

Idempotent: re-running on an already-onboarded test account does not
duplicate workspaces or profiles.

Use this endpoint when the test needs an account ready for chat,
offers, etc. Use the simpler `/onboarding` endpoint when the test
needs to assert behavior at a specific onboarding state.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, invalid_kind, invalid_clerk_user_id.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: onboard_full_failed, set_onboarding_failed, get_account_failed.

post.description:
Creates (or returns existing) chat conversation for the brand↔creator pair.
Bypasses the production trigger flow (invite/application acceptance).
Optionally seeds deterministic text messages for history/scroll tests.

Idempotent: if a conversation already exists for the pair it is returned.
Seed messages, when requested, are appended on top of any existing ones.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_payload, same_account, seed_messages_count_too_large.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: seed_conversation_failed.

post.description:
Creates or updates one test campaign in a brand workspace. The request
is idempotent by either `campaign_id` or by stable
`brand_workspace_id` + `campaign_key`.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, invalid_brand_workspace_id, invalid_campaign_id, campaign_identity_required, invalid_campaign_fixture.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: upsert_test_campaign_failed. Cause is included in `message` for /v1/test/* endpoints.

post.description: Creates or updates one test campaign participant by campaign_id + creator_account_id.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, invalid_campaign_id, invalid_brand_workspace_id, invalid_creator_account_id, invalid_source, invalid_status, invalid_deliverables_counts.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: upsert_test_campaign_participant_failed. Cause is included in `message` for /v1/test/* endpoints.

post.description: Creates or updates one test campaign video visible through campaign video readers.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, invalid_campaign_id, invalid_brand_workspace_id, invalid_creator_account_id, invalid_platform, invalid_url, invalid_status.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: upsert_test_campaign_video_failed. Cause is included in `message` for /v1/test/* endpoints.
Internal Server Error. Possible codes: bulk_seed_failed.

post.description:
Creates or updates the single onboarding profile for an existing test
brand workspace with a deterministic attribution source.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, invalid_brand_workspace_id, invalid_completed_by_account_id, invalid_attribution_source, invalid_referral_text.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: set_attribution_source_failed.

post.description:
Creates or updates the single onboarding profile for an existing test
brand workspace. Accepts legacy attribution values for read fixtures.

400.description: Bad Request. Possible codes: invalid_body, invalid_brand_workspace_id, invalid_completed_by_account_id, invalid_attribution_source, invalid_referral_text.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: upsert_brand_onboarding_profile_failed.

post.description:
This endpoint bypasses the outbox. Use it to trigger handler side-effects
in tests, not to validate outbox persistence guarantees (atomicity,
idempotency by event_id, replay).

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: emit_event_failed.
Internal Server Error. Possible codes: reset_failed.

delete.description:
Hard-deletes a test account and cascades to brand_workspace_memberships,
brand_workspaces (when the account was the last member), creator_profiles,
chat conversations, and chat messages owned by the account.

Idempotent: returns 204 even when the account does not exist.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Possible codes: delete_test_account_failed.

email_like.description:
SQL LIKE pattern matched against `identity_accounts.email`. Must
contain at least one wildcard (`%` or `_`). Examples:
`e2e.%`, `%@e2e.test`, `brand_run42_%@example.com`.

count.description: Number of text messages to seed. Hard cap is 500.

alternating_authors.description:
When true, message at index 0 is authored by the brand, index 1 by
the creator, alternating from there.

mark_read_for.description:
Which side(s) should have read receipts inserted for the seeded
messages. A reader never marks their own messages as read.

SeedOfferReadyInput.description:
When present, the endpoint also creates an active campaign in the
brand workspace plus an accepted application from the creator,
leaving the (campaign_id, conversation_id) pair ready for an
immediate POST /v1/offers call.

campaign_id.description: Only present when the request included seed_offer_ready.
Stable explicit campaign id. Required when campaign_key is absent.

campaign_key.description: Stable key scoped by brand_workspace_id. Required when campaign_id is absent.

fixture_key.description: Optional stable key. Without it, idempotency uses campaign_id + creator_account_id + platform + url.
